title: Listing all apps via GraphQL
excerpt:
Hey there! 
I was wondering if it is possible to list all of the installed apps on my workspace via GraphQL. 
Also, if it possible to query which apps are installed for each user.

posts.author: omikron (omikron@fabricatedinc.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

I was wondering if it is possible to list all of the installed apps on my workspace via GraphQL.
Also, if it possible to query which apps are installed for each user.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @omikron and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today there is no way of retrieving this information using our API.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: omikron (omikron@fabricatedinc.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could you please expose such endpoint?
Would be great for auditing.
